voteDescription: **{initiator}** has initiated a vote to mute **{target}**!
voteExpiredDescription: Vote to mute **{target}** has expired. Only {votes}/{needed} votes received.
dmDescription: You have been muted in **{server}** for **{duration} minutes** by community vote.
dmTip: Boosting the server after being muted grants you 1 hour of immunity from future vote mutes!
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: **{executor}** tried to remove **{target}**'s vote mute without admin permissions.
footerText: Click the button below to cast your vote
